git_commit_info.author: JonJagger <jon@kosli.com>
git_commit_info.message:
Avoid script injection by moving trail_names to an env var

Direct ${{ }} interpolation in run steps is a script injection
risk. It also breaks if the JSON string contains a single quote,
since the value was passed as echo '...'. Using an env var
instead avoids both problems.
